failedAssertions.reason: docs/INDEX.md limits the canonical tree to indexed documents, but several retained docs still sit outside that spine without non-canonical/reference labeling.
docs/migration-guide.md remains retained without explicit retirement even though docs/workflows/data-migration.md warns it may be outdated and points readers to docs/runbooks/migrations.md.
docs/deprecated/INDEX.md does not yet cover all retained hard-cut/reference surfaces, including legacy frontend handoffs and historical workflow guides still surfaced elsewhere.
mission.md still says docs-only work skips validators, which conflicts with the executable docs-only policy that still requires bash ci/lint-knowledgebase.sh.
Canonical docs still mix orchestrator-erp naming with BigBright ERP naming in currently authoritative files.

appliedUpdates.description: Added repo-static docs/governance validation guidance, concurrency limits, and a dedicated flow-validator section so canonical-truth assertions can be tested without starting runtime services.
